category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Croatia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入克罗地亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入克羅地亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Croatia (HZN/HERA/HOPS) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, and national installation rules.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与克罗地亚（HZN/HERA/HOPS）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求和国家安装规则。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與克羅地亞（HZN/HERA/HOPS）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求和國家安裝規則。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Croatia (HZN/HERA/HOPS) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行克罗地亚（HZN/HERA/HOPS）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行克羅地亞（HZN/HERA/HOPS）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Croatia-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented through member-state practice, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection, and Croatia/HERA/HEP-ODS installation and grid-operator coordination. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness and Rijeka is the primary entry port.
answer_first.zh: 对于克罗地亚，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、成员国实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护，以及克罗地亚HERA/HEP-ODS并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备，里耶卡为主要入境口岸。
answer_first.zht: 對於克羅地亞，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、會員國實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護，以及克羅地亞HERA/HEP-ODS併網/專案協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備，里耶卡為主要入境口岸。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
